data.name: My Girlfriend's New Kink
data.detailed_description:
About the Game

My Girlfriend’s New Kink is an adult visual novel that explores love, temptation, and the delicate line between devotion and desire.
You play as Alex, a young university student whose girlfriend, Anna, is about to leave for an Erasmus program in Italy, an experience that will test the strength of your bond and awaken emotions you never knew existed.

But the true beating heart of this story is you.
Every choice you make will shape the people around you, change how they see the world and how the world itself reacts to you. Your actions, your desires, and your doubts will color each scene, turning every decision into a step toward passion, betrayal… or redemption.

Will you stay faithful despite temptation?
Will you embrace Anna’s awakening abroad or lose yourself in your own forbidden fantasies?

A Story of Choice and Consequence

At first, you’ll see everything through Alex’s eyes, but as the story unfolds, you’ll also take control of Anna during her journey in Italy, where she meets her roommates Giulia and Michele.
And then there’s Sierra, a gothic girl who seems distant and mysterious… yet hides something truly dark inside.

Every route is optional, every decision matters. Remember: Your desires will shape the fate of each character and define what kind of story you experience.

Themes & Routes

This visual novel explores the dynamics of open relationships and emotional complexity through multiple paths and perspectives.
Experience unique routes such as Harem, NTR (Netorare), NTS (Netorase), Cheating, Femdom, Cuckqueen, Exhibitionism, and more.

For players seeking deeper exploration, the game also includes completely optional scenes featuring pegging and trap/sissy content.

Not Just an Erotic Adventure

What truly defines this story is not only its sensuality, but the emotional depth of its characters.
Discover the inner demons of the women you love and help them face their fears, insecurities, and desires.
Through masterful storytelling, My Girlfriend’s New Kink brings to life a world where emotions are as powerful, and dangerous, as lust itself.

Features

  • Deep, branching narrative with meaningful choices

  • Multiple playable characters and POVs

  • Beautiful, high-quality CGs and character art

  • Unique endings with every main woman in the story

  • Exclusive to the Steam version: Play from Anna’s POV and discover everything she experienced during her first days in Italy, including brand-new scenes and events!

  • English and Italian localization

data.short_description: My Girlfriend’s New Kink is an adult visual novel about love, desire, and choices. Experience a branching story where every route is optional and your decisions shape the fate of Alex, Anna, and those around them.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 / AMD equivalent, 1.2 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Mouse, keyboard, and a minimum resolution of 1280x720 are recommended.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / AMD equivalent, 2.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Full HD 1920x1080 display recommended for the best visual experience.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.12 (Sierra) or higher
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU compatible with OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Mouse, keyboard, and a minimum resolution of 1280x720 are recommended.
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.15 (Catalina) or higher
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon (M1 or newer) or Intel Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU compatible with OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Full HD 1920x1080 display recommended for the best visual experience.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 or SteamOS 3.0
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Mouse, keyboard, and a minimum resolution of 1280x720 are recommended.
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or SteamOS 3.0
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
